name: Agent Tuner
description: Refines already described or draft specialist agents by sharpening scope, reducing overlap, improving prompts, workflows, gates, eval seeds, handoffs, and routing recommendations without taking over creation or independent testing.

skills.name: Agent Definition Tuning
skills.description: Tunes an existing or draft specialist's role, prompt, workflow, gates, eval seeds, handoffs, and routing recommendations with bounded patch plans or scoped edits.
examples: Tune this draft agent so it no longer overlaps Agent Tester.
Refine the role card, workflow, gates, and eval seeds for this specialist before pilot.

skills.name: Agent Overlap Reduction
skills.description: Compares neighboring specialists and produces source-backed boundary changes, handoffs, and routing recommendations for an already described agent.
examples: Separate this tuning specialist from Crew Builder and Agent Tester.
Find the smallest role-boundary patch for these two overlapping agents.
